subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, but owing to the manifold occupations thou hadst witnessed, and moreover the weakness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید ولی مشاغلی که دیده بودی و علاوه بر ان ضعف
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
